snippet.title: DC - Official Trailer | Lokesh Kanagaraj | Sun Pictures | Anirudh | Arun Matheswaran | Wamiqa Gabbi
snippet.description:
Presenting the official trailer of the movie "DC", Starring Lokesh Kanagaraj and Wamiqa Gabbi,
Directed by Arun Matheswaran, Music by Anirudh and Produced by Sun Pictures.

Music Credits:
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander
Vocals by Faraz

Composed, Arranged by Anirudh Ravichander
Keyboard, Synth & Rhythm Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander

en-US.title: Listening to the "Vat Savitri Vrat Katha" today brings happiness, good fortune, long life and ful...
en-US.description:
VAT SAVITRI VRAT:-
The greatest benefit of observing the Vat Savitri fast is the husband's long life. It is believed that listening to this story alleviates the troubles facing the husband and bestows a long life on him.
The banyan tree is believed to be home to the three gods Brahma, Vishnu, and Mahesh. Listening to this story and circumambulating the banyan tree bestows eternal virtue and removes sorrow and poverty from the home.

Dekh Lun Tujhe ‚Äì Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Bas ek baar‚Ä¶
dekh lun tujhe.

Na shikayat karni hai
na koi sawaal‚Ä¶
bas aankhon ko
thoda sukoon chahiye.

‚ÄúDekh Lun Tujhe‚Äù
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo mohabbat ko
aaj bhi utni hi shiddat se mehsoos karta hai.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
yaadein bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai ‚Äî

ek nazar dekh loon tujhe
to dil ko chain aa jaaye‚Ä¶

kabhi kisi ko
sirf ek baar dekhne ki
dua ki ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

snippet.description:
#kavitakrishnamurthy #vinodrathod #khalnayak #bollywoodsongs #hindisong #sanjaydutt 

Song Credits:
Song: Khal Nayak Hoon Mein
Movie: Khal Nayak
Singers: Kavita Krishnamurthy, Vinod Rathod
Lyrics: Anand Bakshi
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal

Movie Credits:
Producer: Subhash Ghai
Director: Subhash Ghai
StarCast: Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher

Song Lyrics:

Ji Haan 
Main Hoon Khal Nayak

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 

Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hai Tu
Is Pyaar Ki Tujhko Kya Kadar
Is Pyaar Ke Kahan Layak Hai Tu

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main

Teri Tabiyat Toh Rangeen Hai 
Par Tu Mohabbat Ki Tauheen Hai

Kuch Bhi Nahi Yaad Iske Siwa
Na Main Kisika Na Koi Mera
Jo Cheez Maangi Nahi Woh Mili
Karta Main Kya Aur Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li

Main Bhi Sharafat Se Jeeta Magar
Mujhko Shareefon Se Lagta Tha Darr
Sabko Pata Tha Main Kamzor Hoon
Main Isliye Aaj Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu

Kitne Khilono Se Khela Hai Tu 
Afsos Phir Bhi Akela Hai Tu

Bachpan Mein Likhi Kahani Meri
Kaise Badalti Jawani Meri
Saara Samundar Mere Paas Hai
Ek Boond Paani Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Dekha Tha Maa Ne Kabhi Pyaar Se
Ab Mil Gayi Woh Bhi Sansaar Se
Main Woh Lootera Hoon Jo Lutt Gaya 
Maa Ka Bhi Aanchal Kahin Chhut Gaya

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu
Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi 
Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi 
Khal Nayak Hoon Main

Nayak 
Khal Nayak
Nayak 
Khal Nayak
Nayak 
Khal Nayak

snippet.title: Top 10 Most Misleading Trailers that Ruined the Film Experience
snippet.description:
Basic ga oka trailer cinema ni sell cheyyali, kani dominate cheyyakudadhu. Kani mana Tollywood lo teaser/trailer chusi picha hype ekkinchukuni, theater ki vellaka "idhekkadi mass ra mawa" ani thalakaya pakkanapettukunna sandharbhalu chala unnai.

From Pawan Kalyan‚Äôs Komaram Puli to Rajinikanth‚Äôs Kabali, makers manalni marketing tho ela manipulate chesaru? Teaser lo unna aa "Robotic Spider" movie lo ledhu enduku? Saaho why it felt like an oversold dream?

Ee video lo manam "Top 10 Most Misleading Trailers that Ruined the Film Experience" gurinchi detail ga matladukundham. Indulo mee list lo unna movie undha? Ledha? Comment below!
#FilmyGeeks #Tollywood #TeluguCinema #MovieAnalysis #MisleadingTrailers #PawanKalyan #Prabhas #MaheshBabu #Rajinikanth #Saaho #Komaram Puli #Spyder #Kabali #MovieMarketing #teluguyoutube

Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai ‚Äî jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ‚ù§Ô∏è

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.

snippet.title: Jo Prem Gali Me Aaya Nahi | Superhit Radha Krishna Bhajan | Bhakti Song | ý§úý•ã ý§™ý•çý§∞ý•áý§Æ ý§óý§≤ý•Ä ý§Æý•áý§Ç ý§Üý§Øý§æ ý§®ý§πý•Äý§Ç
snippet.description:
üôè Welcome to Devotional Diary Music üôè
"Har panna bhakti ka, har sur shakti ka." ‚ú®

Song   :-  Jo Prem Gali Me Aaya Nahi
Singer :- Aavya Dubey 
Writer  :- Traditional
Digital :- Devotional Diary Music
Label  :-  SK Entertainment
Producer  :- Naresh Dayma
Edit  :- Amit Kumar

Devotional Diary Music par hum aapka swagat karte hain. Hamara yeh channel ek aisi digital diary hai jahan hum rozana ishwar ki mahima, unke bhajan, aur pavitra mantras ko sangeet ke roop mein sanjote hain.

Agar aap apne mann ki shanti aur aatmic sukoon ki talash mein hain, toh aap sahi jagah aaye hain. Is channel par aapko milenge:

üìñ Prabhu Ke Madhur Bhajan (Krishna, Ram, Mahadev, aur sabhi Devi-Devtaon ke)
üìñ Pavitra Chalisa aur Aarti Sangrah
üìñ Dhyan aur Shanti dene wale Mantras
üìñ Morning Bhakti Songs (Din ki shubh shuruat ke liye)

Humara maqsad hai sangeet ke zariye aapko parmatma se jodna. Is bhakti-may safar ka hissa banne ke liye hamare parivaar se judiye.

üîî Channel ko SUBSCRIBE karein aur rozana bhakti ka anubhav karein.

Jai Shree Krishna! Radhe Radhe! üî±

localized.description:
üôè Welcome to Devotional Diary Music üôè
"Har panna bhakti ka, har sur shakti ka." ‚ú®

Song   :-  Jo Prem Gali Me Aaya Nahi
Singer :- Aavya Dubey 
Writer  :- Traditional
Digital :- Devotional Diary Music
Label  :-  SK Entertainment
Producer  :- Naresh Dayma
Edit  :- Amit Kumar

Devotional Diary Music par hum aapka swagat karte hain. Hamara yeh channel ek aisi digital diary hai jahan hum rozana ishwar ki mahima, unke bhajan, aur pavitra mantras ko sangeet ke roop mein sanjote hain.

Agar aap apne mann ki shanti aur aatmic sukoon ki talash mein hain, toh aap sahi jagah aaye hain. Is channel par aapko milenge:

üìñ Prabhu Ke Madhur Bhajan (Krishna, Ram, Mahadev, aur sabhi Devi-Devtaon ke)
üìñ Pavitra Chalisa aur Aarti Sangrah
üìñ Dhyan aur Shanti dene wale Mantras
üìñ Morning Bhakti Songs (Din ki shubh shuruat ke liye)

Humara maqsad hai sangeet ke zariye aapko parmatma se jodna. Is bhakti-may safar ka hissa banne ke liye hamare parivaar se judiye.

üîî Channel ko SUBSCRIBE karein aur rozana bhakti ka anubhav karein.

Jai Shree Krishna! Radhe Radhe! üî±

en-US.title: Sati Savitri Brata Katha | Sati Sabitri Brata Katha | Sati Savitri's sad story | Diptirekha Padhi
en-US.description:
"The immortal story of a great woman who snatched her vermilion from the hands of Yamaraj..."

The Savitri Vrat is not just a worship, it is a symbol of the unwavering faith and devotion of a virtuous woman towards her husband. When the light of Satyavan's life was about to go out, even Yamaraj himself gave up in front of Savitri's chastity.

Listen to this sweet and inspiring story of Savitri Vrat in the very sweet and emotional voice of Dhulerekha Padhi. Listening to this story brings a unique peace to the mind and receives the blessings of Maa Savitri for the long life of the husband. Let us bow down to the feet of that Sati

snippet.title: ý§úý§æý§®ý•á ý§ïý•çý§Øý•ãý§Ç ý§≤ý•ãý§ó ý§Æý•ãý§πý§¨ý•çý§¨ý§§ ý§ïý§øý§Øý§æ | Mehboob Ki Mehndi | Lata Mangeshkar Songs | Leena Chandavarkar
snippet.description:
üé∂ Welcome to a journey through the golden era of Hindi music, where the melodies of Lata Mangeshkar reigned supreme. Today, we immerse ourselves in the poignant beauty of "Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya" from the movie Mehboob Ki Mehndi. This song, a timeless classic from the 1970s, captures the essence of love, longing, and the bittersweet realities of the human heart. Lata Ji's ethereal voice, combined with the song's heartfelt lyrics, creates an unforgettable experience that resonates with generations. It speaks of love, loss, hope, and despair, all woven together in a tapestry of emotions. 



Credits :

Song: Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya
Album: Mehboob Ki Mehndi
Artist: Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 



Lyrics :

is zamane me, is mohabat ne
kitne dil tode, kitne ghar phunke
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
dil ke badale darde dil liya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

tanhayi milti hai, mahafil nahi milti
rahe mahobat me kabhi manzil nahi milti
dil tut jata hai, nakam hota hai
ulfat ye logo ka yahi anjam hota hai
koi kya jane, kyu ye parawane,
kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

sawan me aankho ko, kitana rulati hai
furasat me jab dil ko kisi ki yaad aati hai
ye zindagi yu hi barabad hoti hai
har waqt hotho pe koi fariyad hoti hai
na dawao ka naam chalata hai
na duao se kam chalata hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

mahabub se har gum manasub hota hai
din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai
rato se bhi lambe ye pyar ke kise
aashiq sunate hai zafa ye yaar ke kise
bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,
us sitamagar ka apne dilwar ka,
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

If you're moved by this timeless melody, give it a thumbs up! Share your favorite Lata Mangeshkar song in the comments below, and don't forget to subscribe for more golden gems from the world of Hindi music. Let the magic of music live on‚Ä¶

gl.description:
üé∂ Welcome to a journey through the golden era of Hindi music, where the melodies of Lata Mangeshkar reigned supreme. Today, we immerse ourselves in the poignant beauty of "Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya" from the movie Mehboob Ki Mehndi. This song, a timeless classic from the 1970s, captures the essence of love, longing, and the bittersweet realities of the human heart. Lata Ji's ethereal voice, combined with the song's heartfelt lyrics, creates an unforgettable experience that resonates with generations. It speaks of love, loss, hope, and despair, all woven together in a tapestry of emotions. 



Credits :

Song: Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya
Album: Mehboob Ki Mehndi
Artist: Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 



Lyrics :

is zamane me, is mohabat ne
kitne dil tode, kitne ghar phunke
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
dil ke badale darde dil liya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

tanhayi milti hai, mahafil nahi milti
rahe mahobat me kabhi manzil nahi milti
dil tut jata hai, nakam hota hai
ulfat ye logo ka yahi anjam hota hai
koi kya jane, kyu ye parawane,
kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

sawan me aankho ko, kitana rulati hai
furasat me jab dil ko kisi ki yaad aati hai
ye zindagi yu hi barabad hoti hai
har waqt hotho pe koi fariyad hoti hai
na dawao ka naam chalata hai
na duao se kam chalata hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

mahabub se har gum manasub hota hai
din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai
rato se bhi lambe ye pyar ke kise
aashiq sunate hai zafa ye yaar ke kise
bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,
us sitamagar ka apne dilwar ka,
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

snippet.title: Reble - Praying Mantis (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"Praying Mantis" draws from the insect's deceptive posture. Appearing in prayer while quietly waiting to strike - mirroring the track's poised, watchful energy. Calm on the surface but sharply intentional underneath, the song captures Reble moving with confidence as her moment has arrived.

Stream now: https://ffm.to/pm7

Audio Credits
Written, Performed & Composed by: Reble
Produced by: Lifted
Recording Engineer: Aniket Mohanty
Mixed & Mastered by: Akash Shravan

Video Credits
Director: Vimal | https://www.instagram.com/vilssaro/
DOP: Diwakar | https://www.instagram.com/abidiwa/
Asst. DOP: Leander | https://www.instagram.com/leander__daniel/
Editor: Anush Surya Kumar | https://www.instagram.com/christopherchullan/
VFX: Philip Edge 
BTS: Robin | https://www.instagram.com/robinnatelier/
Producer: Knack Entertainment | https://www.instagram.com/knack_entertainment/
Unit Production Manager: Rohit Chouhan
Line Production Unit: Habakordor Syiem, Heimon Kharsyntiew, Medon Mylliemngap, Rico Nengnong
Colourist: Marina Tebechrani | https://www.instagram.com/marina_tebechrani/
Drone Operator: Kyrshan Pathaw & Lebanriford Dohling
Gear Caretaker: Jayanta Das & Kissing Baro
Cast: Alethea Tariang, Amy M Rani, Clareen Khyriem, Dorothea Tariang, Elynne Lyngdoh, Hazel Mukhim, Niharika Debbarma, Susana M Khyriem
Shout Out: Jeepers Family & Maniacs on Big Bikes | https://www.instagram.com/_jeepers_family/ https://www.instagram.com/__m.o.b.b__/
Stylist: Robertson Lyngdoh | https://www.instagram.com/robertson_lyngdoh_/
Asst Stylist: Elaine Wallang | https://www.instagram.com/elaine_wallang/
Album Art: Jay Pimpalkhare 
Creative Support: Naitik Srivastava

Special Thanks To: The Office of Sports and Youth Affairs, Meghalaya

A Homegrown Music / Atlantic Records release.

Follow Reble: https://instagram.com/rebleofficial  
Follow Homegrown Music: https://instagram.com/homegrowninmusic  

#PrayingMantis #Reble #HomegrownMusic #AtlanticRecords #Newmusic #Indianhiphop #northeastindia #shillong #meghalaya #guwahati

snippet.title: ý•õý§øý§®ý•çý§¶ý§óý•Ä ý§¨ý§® ý§óý§è ý§πý•ã ý§§ý•Åý§Æ | Kasoor | Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan Songs | Aftab Shivdasani | Lisa Ray
snippet.description:
Dive into the enchanting world of Alka Yagnik and Udit Narayan with 'Zindagi Ban Gaye Ho Tum' from the movie Kasoor, a true gem from the 2000s. This era gifted us with some of the most heart-touching melodies, and this song stands as a testament to their incredible talent. Their voices intertwine to create a symphony of love, capturing the raw emotion and tender feelings that define true romance. Listen to the pure voice of these two legends. 



Credits :

Song: Zindagi Ban Gaye Ho Tum
Album: Kasoor
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 



Lyrics :

Jo meri rooh ko chain de pyaar de
Woh khushi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum
Jo meri rooh ko chain de pyaar de
Woh khushi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum


Jism se jaan tak paas aate gaye
In nigaahon se dil mein samaate gaye
Jism se jaan tak paas aate gaye
In nigaahon se dil mein samaate gaye
Jis haseen khwab ki thi tamanna muhje
Haan wahi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum
Jo meri rooh ko chain de pyaar de
Woh khushi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum


Har kisi se jise main chhupati rahin
Bekhudi mein jise gungunati rahin
Har kisi se jise main chhupati rahin
Bekhudi mein jise gungunati rahin
Maine tanha kabhi jo likhi thi wahi
Shaayri ban gaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum


Jo meri rooh ko chain de pyaar de
Woh khushi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum
Zindagi bangaye ho tum.

snippet.title: Agar Tum Mil Jao (Lyrics) - Shreya Ghoshal | Zeher
snippet.description:
#AgarTumMilJao #ShreyaGhoshal #Zeher

Agar Tum Mil Jao (Lyrics) - Shreya Ghoshal | Zeher

Experience the timeless romance with 'Agar Tum Mil Jao' from the movie Zeher. Sung by Shreya Ghoshal, this soulful melody captures the essence of love and longing. Let the haunting melody and poignant lyrics take you on an emotional journey.

Song Credit:
Singer: Shreya Ghoshal
Movie/Album: Zeher (2005)
Lyricist: Sayeed Qadri
Music: Anu Malik, Roop Kumar Rathod

Lyrics:

Agar tum mil jao
Zamana chhod denge hum
Agar tum mil jao
Zamaana chhod denge hum
Agar tum mil jao
Zamana chhod denge hum

Tumhe paakar zamaane bhar se
Rishta tod denge hum
Agar tum mil jao
Zamaana chhod denge hum
Agar tum mil jao
Zamaana chhod denge hum

Bina tere koi dilkash nazara hum na dekhenge
Bina tere koi dilkash nazara hum na dekhenge
Tumhe na ho pasand usko doobara hum na dekhenge
Teri soorat na ho jis mein mm..
Teri soorat na ho jis mein
Woh sheesha tod denge hum
Agar tum mil jao
Zamaana chhod denge hum

Tere dil mein rahenge
Tujhko apna ghar bana lenge
Tere dil mein rahenge
Tujhko apna ghar bana lenge
Tere khwabon ko gehno ki tarah
Khud par sajaa lenge
Kasam teri kasam aa..
Kasam teri kasam
Taqdeer ka ruk mod denge hum
Agar tum mil jao
Zamaana chod denge hum

Tumhe hum apne jism-o-jaan mein
Kuch aise basaa lenge
Tumhe hum apne jism-o-jaan mein
Kuch aise basaa lenge
Teri khushboo apne jism ki
Khushboo bana lenge
Khuda se bhi na jo toote aa..
Khuda se bhi na jo toote
Woh rishta jod lenge hum
Agar tum mil jao
Zamaana chhod denge hum

Tumhe paa kar zamaane bhar se
Rishta tod denge hum
Agar tum mil jao
Zamaana chhod denge hum
Agar tum mil jao
Zamaana chhod denge hum
